description_long: This bonsai features a robust, gnarled trunk with prominent, exposed roots that splay outward, giving it a dramatic and ancient appearance. The trunk rises and then branches out into a dense canopy of finely detailed, needle-like green foliage, reminiscent of a miniature conifer or cedar. The branches are layered and spread horizontally, creating a broad, flat-topped silhouette that is visually striking. The foliage is lush and thick, with overlapping branches that provide a sense of fullness and maturity. The roots are particularly notable, extending above the ground and adding to the tree's character and sense of age. No pot is visible, suggesting the bonsai is either displayed without one or the roots are meant to be a focal point.
description: A lush, mature bonsai with a thick, gnarled trunk, exposed roots, and a dense, flat-topped canopy of green needle-like foliage.
description_view_0: The bonsai is seen with its wide, spreading canopy and prominent, splayed roots clearly visible at the base.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the shadowed side of the trunk and roots, with the dense foliage cascading more to the right.
description_view_2: The front-facing view shows the symmetrical spread of the branches and the full, layered canopy above the exposed roots.
description_view_3: The bonsai is viewed with the roots and trunk slightly angled, showing the depth and layering of the foliage.
attribute_pot_type: No pot is visible; the bonsai appears to be displayed with exposed roots, possibly in a naturalistic or root-over-rock style.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is thick and gnarled with a natural, informal upright style, featuring gentle curves and prominent, outward-splaying roots.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are densely layered and spread horizontally, forming a broad, flat-topped canopy with a radial, naturalistic arrangement.
attribute_leaf_density: The foliage is dense and lush, with little open space between the branches, creating a full and mature appearance.
